headline: WordPress has a plugin for everything — and each one has a monthly bill.
body: I chose a different stack specifically so I can build what you need instead of renting it forever. Calendly is $10–16/month. Eventbrite takes 6.6% + $1.79 off every ticket. For something you'll use for years, building it once often costs less than 12 months of subscriptions — and you own it. If you already have tools you rely on, I'll work with those instead. We'll figure out what makes sense before anything gets scoped.

examples.name: Booking calendar
examples.desc: Calendly is $10–16/month. Build it once, own it.

examples.name: Event ticketing
examples.desc: Eventbrite takes 6.6% + $1.79 per ticket. That adds up.

examples.name: Customer portal
examples.desc: Client login, order history, account info — built to your specs.

examples.name: Contact forms & CRM
examples.desc: Capture leads the way your business actually works.
